About Pine City Zoo

A Living Sanctuary in the Heart of South Africa

Pine City Zoo is home to more than 80 animal species from across the globe, set within 32 hectares of beautifully landscaped parkland. Since opening in 1976, we have been committed to conservation, education, and unforgettable wildlife encounters.

Every visit supports our global conservation partnerships and breeding programmes for endangered species.

Pine City Zoo

Our Animals

Meet the remarkable residents of Pine City Zoo — from the African savannah to the forests of Asia.

Wildlife Collection

80+ Species Across 5 Zones

Africa Zone

African Lion

The king of the savannah. Our pride roars at feeding time — don't miss it!

Africa Zone

African Elephant

The largest land animal on Earth. Watch them cool off at their watering hole.

Asia Zone

Giant Panda

Our beloved residents of Panda Canyon. Spot them munching bamboo all day.

Africa Zone

Mountain Gorilla

Our silverback Kong is much gentler than he looks — a true gentle giant.

Africa Zone

Gemsbok

The iconic oryx of the Kalahari, with striking black-and-white facial markings.

Africa Zone

Giraffe

Tallest land animal on Earth. Our giraffes love company and enjoy visitors!

Australasia Zone

Koala

Australia's iconic marsupial — sleepy, fluffy, and utterly adorable.

Asia Zone

Dusky Leaf Monkey

Spectacled and expressive — these playful primates are endlessly entertaining.

Africa Zone

Warthog

Don't let the looks fool you — warthogs are fascinating and surprisingly fast!

Asia Zone

Amur Tiger

The world's largest wild cat — power, grace and striking orange stripes.

Insect World

Insect House

Explore the miniature world of incredible invertebrates — 200+ species!

Pine City Zoo — where wildlife conservation meets unforgettable family experiences.

We Can't Wait to See You

Plan Your Visit

Everything you need to know for a perfect day at Pine City Zoo.

🕗 Opening Hours

Monday – Friday08:00 – 17:00
Saturday – Sunday07:30 – 18:00
Public Holidays08:00 – 16:00
Christmas Day09:00 – 14:00
Last entry1 hour before closing

🎟 Ticket Prices

Adult (13–64)
Full day access
R185
Child (3–12)
Full day access
R95
Senior (65+)
With valid ID
R110
Toddler (0–2)
Free entry
FREE
Family Pack (2+2)
2 adults, 2 children
R490
Annual Pass
Unlimited visits, 12 months
R650

📍 Getting Here

Address: 12 Savanna Drive, Pine City, Gauteng, 0001

By Car: Take the N1 North to the Pine City off-ramp, follow Zoo signage on Savanna Drive. Free parking on-site.

By Bus: Route 47 stops at the zoo entrance — buses every 30 minutes on weekends.

By Uber/Taxi: Drop-off zone at the main entrance on Savanna Drive.

🍳 Food & Drink

Mo's Pizza
Authentic thick-crust pizzas and pastas at the main Food Court.
Wild Things Café
Freshly brewed coffee, sandwiches, desserts and light bites.
Dine @ the Zoo
Gourmet outdoor dining with live music — reserve your table.

♿ Accessibility

✓Fully paved accessible routes throughout the zoo
✓Wheelchair hire at main entrance (R50 deposit)
✓Accessible parking bays adjacent to entrance
✓Accessible restrooms at all facilities
✓Tactile maps and audio guides on request
✓Sign language for weekend shows (pre-book required)
✓Assistance animals welcome throughout the zoo
